mapper.sql: id, ro_id, ro_item, qty, rec_qty, modelno, remark, from_inventory_id, from_inventory_table_type, qa_status, green_code, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, netWeight
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_ro_item
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_ro_item (id, ro_id, ro_item, qty, rec_qty, modelno, remark, from_inventory_id, from_inventory_table_type, qa_status, green_code, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, netWeight ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{recQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fromInventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL} )

insert into dbo.ops_ro_item
id,
ro_id,
ro_item,
qty,
rec_qty,
modelno,
remark,
from_inventory_id,
from_inventory_table_type,
qa_status,
green_code,

cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
netWeight,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_ro_item
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_item = #{record.roItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rec_qty = #{record.recQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_inventory_id = #{record.fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_inventory_table_type = #{record.fromInventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qa_status = #{record.qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
green_code = #{record.greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
netWeight = #{record.netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update dbo.ops_ro_item set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_item = #{record.roItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rec_qty = #{record.recQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_inventory_id = #{record.fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, from_inventory_table_type = #{record.fromInventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qa_status = #{record.qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, green_code = #{record.greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, netWeight = #{record.netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update dbo.ops_ro_item
ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_item = #{roItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rec_qty = #{recQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_inventory_id = #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_inventory_table_type = #{fromInventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qa_status = #{qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
green_code = #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
netWeight = #{netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_ro_item set ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_item = #{roItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rec_qty = #{recQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_inventory_id = #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, from_inventory_table_type = #{fromInventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qa_status = #{qaStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, green_code = #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, netWeight = #{netweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
